allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); subs=set\(p[''subdomain''] for p in d[''providers'']\); print\(f''Total: {d[""totalProviders""]} providers across {len\(subs\)} subdomains''\); print\(''Subdomains:'', sorted\(subs\)\)")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=walkin_dev_password psql -h localhost -U walkin_dev -d walkin_dev -c "SELECT name, latitude, longitude FROM clinics LIMIT 5;")
Bash(docker exec walkinnow-postgres psql -U walkin_dev -d walkin_dev -c "SELECT name, latitude, longitude FROM clinics WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;")
Bash(docker exec walkinnow-postgres psql -U postgres -d walkinnow -c "SELECT name, latitude, longitude FROM clinics WHERE latitude IS NOT NULL LIMIT 10;")
Bash(docker exec walkinnow-postgres psql -U postgres -d walkinnow -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(latitude\) as with_coords FROM clinics;")
Bash(docker exec walkinnow-postgres psql -U postgres -d walkinnow -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) as total, COUNT\(latitude\) as with_coords, COUNT\(api_url_template\) as with_api FROM clinics;")

Bash(docker exec walkinnow-postgres psql -U postgres -d walkinnow -c "DELETE FROM clinics WHERE slug IN \(''st-georges-medical-clinic'',''medview-medical-clinic'',''north-vancouver-urgent-primary-care-centre'',''choice-medical-clinic'',''arena-medical-clinic'',''medcare-plus-medical-clinic'',''canway-medical-centre'',''old-orchard-medical-clinic'',''total-life-care-medical'',''edmonds-medical-clinic'',''summit-view-medical-centre'',''newgen-clayton-medical-clinic'',''gateway-medical-centre'',''livewell-medical-centre'',''grace-medical-clinic'',''cook-road-medical-clinic'',''well-health-richmond-central-medical-clinic'',''ackroyd-medical-centre'',''live-well-medical-centre-richmond'',''aberdeen-health-centre'',''tenth-street-medicentre'',''elicare-royal-city-medical'',''mountainview-health-medical-clinic'',''care-point-coquitlam-centre'',''nova-care-medical-centre'',''plateau-medical-clinic'',''integrated-wellness-medical-centre'',''all-care-walk-in-clinic'',''pure-care-clinic-langley'',''fraser-medicine-centre'',''willoughby-medical-centre'',''langley-crossing-medical-clinic'',''willowbrook-medical-clinic'',''ladner-centre-medical'',''delta-medical-centre''\);")

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys d=json.load\(sys.stdin\) print\(f''{d[""name""]} | {d[""address""][""city""]} | {d[""address""][""line_1""]} | private={d.get\(""ebooking_private"",False\)}''\)" done)

Bash(python3 -c " import json,sys types=json.load\(sys.stdin\) if isinstance\(types,list\): clinic_types = [t for t in types if t[''interaction_type''] in \(''CLINIC'',''VIRTUAL_OR_CLINIC''\)] for t in clinic_types[:3]: print\(f'' {t[""id""]}: {t[""name""]} \({t[""interaction_type""]}\)''\) if not clinic_types: print\('' \(no CLINIC types\)''\) else: print\('' error''\) " done)
